positive: A central, symmetrical design featuring interwoven bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. The main subject is a stylized, intricate mandala-like composition combining glowing rainforest vines, crescent moons, and delicate star constellations. The style must be highly detailed, psychedelic neo-art deco, with a strong emphasis on clean, deep contrast between matte black negative space and vibrant, glowing accents (electric cyan, deep sapphire, lime green, and gold leaf elements). Use perfect symmetry and sharp vector-art linework. The composition must be designed for a circular or square apparel print, maximizing visual impact and silhouette definition. Cinematic studio lighting, high resolution, graphic novel style.
negative: blur, lowres, grainy, amateur, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, cropped, blurry lines, messy, smudge, abstract mess, messy composition, cluttered
